criteria.requirement: Machine-readable inventory exists for every detected task sheet with readiness, solution status, rendered-page availability, and extracted-image availability.
notes: Each sheet includes readiness, solutionStatus, renderedPageCount, and extractedImageAssetCount.

criteria.requirement: Verifier exists and fails unless every real task sheet is ready or has accepted blocker reason 1-5.
notes: Current report has ok=false because 8 sheets are still unprocessed.

criteria.requirement: At least one previously unprocessed sheet is curated through API/CLI, not frontend clicks.
notes: Resource 947753 / Aufgabenblatt 12 was written to the improved task artifact.

criteria.requirement: The curated sheet is verified through artifacts and task-view as ready with readOnly=false, preserved Moodle source reference, no raw placeholder, and image evidence used or accounted for.
notes: Task-view evidence shows ready, readOnly=false, contentStatus=codex-improved.
Task-view prompt preserves moodle-resource:947753, has extracted image evidence, and has no unprocessed placeholder.

criteria.requirement: Remaining sheets have clear machine-readable status.
notes: Current summary is 4 ready, 8 unprocessed, 0 blocked, 0 invalid.
Every remaining unprocessed sheet still has solution, rendered-page, and extracted-image status.

criteria.requirement: The user reviews and explicitly accepts the non-UI result before Goal 1.5 or Goal 2 starts.
notes: This criterion cannot be completed by code.
Goal 1 stays open until the user explicitly accepts the non-UI result.
